qa_pairs.question: What is one benefit of caching the results of MSA/template search in AlphaFold3?
qa_pairs.answer: One benefit is that the augmented JSON can be reused for multiple different inferences across seeds or across variations of other features, such as a ligand.

qa_pairs.question: What variations can be explored by reusing the augmented JSON from cached MSA/template search results?
qa_pairs.answer: The augmented JSON can be reused to explore variations across seeds or across variations of other features, for example, a ligand.

qa_pairs.question: Where can users find reference documentation for AlphaFold3 inputs?
qa_pairs.answer: Users can find reference documentation for AlphaFold3 inputs at https://github.com/google-deepmind/alphafold3/blob/main/docs/input.md.

qa_pairs.question: Where can users find reference documentation for AlphaFold3 outputs?
qa_pairs.answer: Users can find reference documentation for AlphaFold3 outputs at https://github.com/google-deepmind/alphafold3/blob/main/docs/output.md.

qa_pairs.question: Where can users find reference documentation for AlphaFold3 performance?
qa_pairs.answer: Users can find reference documentation for AlphaFold3 performance at https://github.com/google-deepmind/alphafold3/blob/main/docs/performance.md.
